name: Flexio Design System
description: Design system extracted from the Flexio business-consultancy template. Warm, energetic, editorial style built on a soft cream canvas with a vivid orange primary, playful rounded geometric shapes (half-circles, pills, bars), oversized bold display headlines, and pastel category accents. Pill-shaped buttons and tags recur throughout.

logo.mark: Rounded half-circle (semicircle) sun/arch shape: orange top half over a dark navy-black bottom half
logo.favicon: Use the half-circle sun mark (no wordmark), orange-over-dark, on transparent or cream background
logo.usage: The semicircle mark works standalone as favicon/app icon; pair with the dark wordmark for the full lockup

lime.name: Limoen Lime
lime.role: Primair accent / energie, accentbanden, highlight-pills (altijd donkere tekst)

green.name: Helder Groen
green.role: Tertiair accent / interactie, iconen, category accent

forestMedium.name: Medium Bosgroen
forestMedium.role: Secundaire groene vlakken, kaarten op donkere secties, shape fills

lila.name: Zacht Lila
lila.role: Subtiel contrast-accent (spaarzaam), enkele tag of pill

forest.name: Diep Bosgroen
forest.role: Primaire CTA, donkere sectie-achtergronden, stat-cards (altijd lichte tekst)

header.layout: pill-shaped floating navbar: logo left, nav links center-left, primary CTA pill right

tag.description: Small uppercase pill label introducing a section; alternates between lime, forest-green and soft lila

serviceCard.description: Image-filled card with title and plus icon top, caption bottom, dark gradient overlay for legibility

processCard.description: Numbered step card: forest-green circular number badge, bold title, muted description

categoryPill.description: Large rounded pill tags in assorted green/lila accent colors, scattered/staggered layout (no two adjacent the same)

checkItem.description: List row with bright-green starburst/seal check icon, bold lead-in then muted detail

ctaSection.accentShapes: geometric half-circles, vertical bars, and circles along the bottom edge in lime/green/forest-medium/lila

footer.layout: multi-column link lists (Page, Social, Studio) + email lead, with an oversized wordmark spanning the bottom edge

logoBar.description: Client logo strip on forest-green band with section tag and headline above, muted/monochrome logos divided by thin separators

geometricShapes.description: Bold rounded geometric primitives used decoratively along section edges and in hero
primitives: full circle split in two colors
geometricShapes.usage: Hero base, CTA bottom edge, footer — playful editorial punctuation

circularPortraits.description: Circular cropped people photos arranged in a staggered row across the hero base
circularPortraits.arrangement: horizontal staggered row, varying vertical offset

floatingLabels.description: Tilted pill labels floating over imagery (e.g. LOST OPPORTUNITIES, LACK OF EXPERTISE, LIMITED SUCCESS)

layout.philosophy: Warm cream canvas, vivid orange energy, oversized bold display headlines, generous whitespace, playful rounded geometry, pill-shaped interactive elements, staggered/asymmetric decorative arrangements, alternating light and orange sections
sections: Hero: section tag + oversized headline + subtitle + dual CTA pills, with staggered circular portraits and geometric shapes along the base
Logo bar on orange band (client trust strip)
Who-we-are stat band: section tag + headline + three orange stat cards
Challenges/barriers split: headline + check-list left, image with floating tilted labels right
Services grid: three image cards with title, plus icon, and caption
Industries-we-serve: headline + scattered colored category pills
Process/approach split: headline + dual CTA left, numbered step cards right
Final CTA on orange band with geometric shapes and a photo circle
Footer with link columns and oversized wordmark
